decision.rationale: Use the same bounded source slice that produced P63 diagnostic evidence, but change the execution shape in P89 before any repeat. This preserves comparability while avoiding a broader live run.

candidate_corpora.title: 100 Mile House TSA 2012 data package pages 1-22
candidate_corpora.page_scope: pages 1-22 from the 2012 data package, represented by three overlapping tracked chunk records
candidate_corpora.source_availability: tracked metadata and chunk manifest exist; raw PDF and chunk text remain ignored runtime material
candidate_corpora.downstream_value: high: data-package facts and assumptions are directly useful for later forest estate modelling evidence retrieval
candidate_corpora.audit_burden: bounded: three chunks and 58,640 tracked character-count total, with previous P63 candidate metrics available
candidate_corpora.risk: medium: P63 exposed provider 524, fenced output, malformed JSONL, and one invalid chunk ID, so P89 must repair ticket shape before another live run
candidate_corpora.reason_selected: Best first slice because it has existing P63 diagnostics, known failure modes, tracked provenance, and enough source density to test recipe v2 without changing the corpus question.

candidate_corpora.title: 100 Mile House TSA 2012 latest-cycle mini corpus
candidate_corpora.source_availability: tracked metadata and chunk manifests exist for all three documents
candidate_corpora.downstream_value: high: covers data package, rationale, and public discussion material for one cycle
candidate_corpora.audit_burden: higher: 16 tracked chunks across three documents before section-level reticketing
candidate_corpora.risk: medium-high: too broad for the first recipe-v2 repair after P63
candidate_corpora.reason_deferred: Good P92 or P93 expansion candidate after recipe v2 proves quality-valid output on the repeat slice.

candidate_corpora.title: 100 Mile House TSA public TSR registry, 1995-present
candidate_corpora.source_availability: tracked corpus metadata exists; not all document chunk manifests are materialized
candidate_corpora.downstream_value: very high: supports historical modelling-evidence retrieval across TSR cycles
candidate_corpora.audit_burden: high: full-corpus scope would hide recipe defects behind scale noise
candidate_corpora.risk: high until recipe v2 and source-anchored audit loop are proven
candidate_corpora.reason_deferred: Scale candidate for P93-P96, not a P88 first slice.

candidate_corpora.title: MP11-style source-anchored repair-prepass seed
candidate_corpora.source_availability: not represented as a complete tracked Agent Workbench corpus registry
candidate_corpora.downstream_value: high as a workflow-shape reference for source-anchored repair and audit
candidate_corpora.audit_burden: unknown in this repository without a tracked corpus slice
candidate_corpora.risk: high for immediate P88 selection because source scope is less concrete in Agent Workbench tracked artifacts
candidate_corpora.reason_deferred: Use as design pressure for P90 repair/audit packets, not as the first selected P88 corpus slice.
